name: com.juanmathe.llmcharacters
description: Connect Unity NPCs to cloud and local LLMs (Claude, Ollama, and more) for believable in-game conversations. A layered context system feeds live game state into every prompt, so characters react to events, weather, and secrets on the fly. All with an LLM-provider interface that lets you swap backends from the Inspector, for fast iteration with no code changes.

samples.description: A minimal scene with two NPCs (one on Anthropic, one on Ollama), dialogue UI, and a WeatherController showing dynamic world context injection.
